neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops.saturationops
 

  • Uses of CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData in neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops.saturationops

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData
    CalcSaltSatauration.readSaltData()
    Reads salt data from the NeqSim COMPSALT database.
    Methods in neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops.saturationops with parameters of type CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    CalcSaltSatauration.addSaltAmount(CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData saltData, double saltAmount)
    Adds a stoichiometric salt amount to the system as dissociated ions.
    private double
    CalcSaltSatauration.calculateKsp(CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData saltData, double temperatureK, double pressureBara)
    Calculates Ksp from the same COMPSALT correlations used by scale-potential calculations.
    private double
    CalcSaltSatauration.calculateSaturationRatio(CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData saltData, int phaseNumber)
    Calculates saturation ratio for the selected salt using aqueous ion activities.
    private double
    CalcSaltSatauration.calculateSaturationRatioForAddition(SystemInterface baseSystem, CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData saltData, double saltAmount)
    Calculates the saturation ratio after adding a trial salt amount to a fresh clone of a base system.
    private void
    CalcSaltSatauration.ensureSaltIonsPresent(CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData saltData)
    Ensures the salt ions are components in the thermodynamic system before the saturation solve.
    private void
    CalcSaltSatauration.removeSaltAmount(CalcSaltSatauration.SaltData saltData, double saltAmount)
    Removes a stoichiometric salt amount from the system as dissociated ions.
